commit_scope: Add four Grammar Lanes to the substrate Form Playground so visitors can create BML action, Python-to-Form, grammar-builder, and cross-modality recipe payloads.

commands: cd web && npm run test -- grammar-lanes.test.ts form-kernel-client.test.ts
local_validation.notes: Focused Vitest passed 6 tests across grammar-lanes and embedded kernel client. Next build passed. Playwright verified the Grammar Lanes section on /substrate/form at desktop 1440px and mobile 390px with no horizontal overflow.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A visitor on /substrate/form can switch between BML / Action Language, Python => Form, Grammar Builder, and Cross-Modality Recipe lanes, edit source input, see a Form-facing payload, and load executable action/Python expressions into the evaluator.
test_flows: Open http://localhost:3118/substrate/form, scroll to Grammar Lanes, verify all four lane buttons are visible.
Click Python => Form and verify the generated payload contains method integration_breath.
Click Grammar Builder and verify the generated payload contains grammar @concept(local-grammar-lane).
Click Cross-Modality Recipe and verify the generated payload contains recipe "teaching recipe".
Measure mobile viewport scrollWidth at 390px and verify it equals innerWidth.

phase_gate.notes: Local proof is complete; CI and deploy proof remain after push/PR.

evidence_refs: Vitest: grammar-lanes.test.ts and form-kernel-client.test.ts passed 6 tests.
Next build: /substrate/form compiled with Grammar Lanes panel.
Playwright: desktop and mobile viewport checks found all four lanes and no mobile horizontal overflow.
